nasb.text: Consider her ramparts; Go through her palaces, That you may tell it to the next generation.

esv.text: consider well her ramparts, go through her citadels, that you may tell the next generation

cnv.text: 細察它的外牆， 巡視它的堡壘， 使你們可以述說給後代的人聽。

ccb.text: 留意她的城墙， 观看她的殿宇， 好告诉子孙后代。

csbs.text: 留心她的城垣，巡察她的城堡， 为要向后代讲述；
